auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Atlas.so API key sent as an Authorization Bearer token. Find it in Atlas under App Config > API: https://app.getatlas.io/configuration/external-api.

anyOf.description: Custom customer fields keyed by Atlas custom field name.
Default sender values for an Atlas customer.

inputSchema.description: Atlas customer fields accepted by create and update endpoints.

anyOf.description: Custom customer fields returned by Atlas.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the customer was created.

anyOf.description: Default sender values for an Atlas customer.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Retrieve a single Atlas account by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving an Atlas account.

anyOf.description: Custom account fields returned by Atlas.

actions.name: get_customer
actions.description: Retrieve a single Atlas customer by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving an Atlas customer.

anyOf.description: Custom customer fields returned by Atlas.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the customer was created.

anyOf.description: Default sender values for an Atlas customer.

actions.name: list_accounts
actions.description: List Atlas accounts visible to the current API key.

cursor.description: The Atlas pagination cursor. Atlas defaults this to 0.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return. Atlas defaults this to 20.

inputSchema.description: Pagination parameters for Atlas list endpoints.

anyOf.description: Custom account fields returned by Atlas.

accounts.description: The Atlas accounts returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The total number of available records when Atlas returns it.
The cursor returned by Atlas for the current page.
The page size returned by Atlas.

actions.name: list_customers
actions.description: List Atlas customers visible to the current API key.

cursor.description: The Atlas pagination cursor. Atlas defaults this to 0.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return. Atlas defaults this to 20.

inputSchema.description: Pagination parameters for Atlas list endpoints.

anyOf.description: Custom customer fields returned by Atlas.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the customer was created.

anyOf.description: Default sender values for an Atlas customer.

customers.description: The Atlas customers returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The total number of available records when Atlas returns it.
The cursor returned by Atlas for the current page.
The page size returned by Atlas.

actions.name: list_sessions
actions.description: List Atlas session recordings with optional customer and date filters.

cursor.description: The Atlas pagination cursor. Atlas defaults this to 0.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return. Atlas defaults this to 20.

externalId.description: The Atlas external session recording ID filter.

startedBefore.description: Return sessions that started before this timestamp.

startedAfter.description: Return sessions that started after this timestamp.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination parameters for listing Atlas session recordings.

customerId.description: The Atlas customer ID associated with this session.

startTime.description: The timestamp when the session started.

lastActivity.description: The timestamp of the last recorded session activity.

sessions.description: The Atlas session recordings returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The total number of available records when Atlas returns it.
The cursor returned by Atlas for the current page.
The page size returned by Atlas.

actions.name: lookup_customer
actions.description: Retrieve a single Atlas customer by ID, email, phone number, or user ID.

inputSchema.description: Lookup keys for retrieving an Atlas customer.

anyOf.description: Custom customer fields returned by Atlas.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the customer was created.

anyOf.description: Default sender values for an Atlas customer.

actions.name: update_customer
actions.description: Update an Atlas customer by ID.

anyOf.description: Custom customer fields keyed by Atlas custom field name.
Default sender values for an Atlas customer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating an Atlas customer.

anyOf.description: Custom customer fields returned by Atlas.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the customer was created.

anyOf.description: Default sender values for an Atlas customer.

actions.name: upsert_account
actions.description: Create or update an Atlas account using the account upsert endpoint.

anyOf.description: Custom account fields keyed by Atlas custom field name.
The primary contact customer ID for the account.
The secondary account manager user ID.

inputSchema.description: Atlas account fields accepted by the account upsert endpoint.

anyOf.description: Custom account fields returned by Atlas.

actions.name: upsert_customer
actions.description: Create or update an Atlas customer using the customer upsert endpoint.

anyOf.description: The external user identifier used by Atlas upsert.
Custom customer fields keyed by Atlas custom field name.
The account payload to associate with this customer.
Alternate phone numbers for this customer.
Alternate email addresses for this customer.

inputSchema.description: Atlas customer fields accepted by the customer upsert endpoint.

anyOf.description: Custom customer fields returned by Atlas.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the customer was created.

anyOf.description: Default sender values for an Atlas customer.
